phase_name: Pure Search Core (Guardrail + Backup + MCTS + Fallback)

Selection policy.question: Budget-allocation rule for select.ts
Selection policy.answer: Deterministic PUCT: walk from root via argmax Q(c) + c_puct*P_maia(c)*sqrt(N)/(1+n(c)), canonical tie-break, expand landed leaf; c_puct a named tunable constant

Selection policy.question: PUCT Q-term at non-root (all-expectation) nodes
Selection policy.answer: Chance-node-aware: Q-based UCB only at root; below root allocate visits by prior mass only (argmax P(c)*sqrt(N)/(1+n(c)), no Q term)

Selection policy.question: Which children the backup expectation ranges over
Selection policy.answer: Full truncated+renormalized top-k set, best-estimate per child: subtree expectation if expanded, sigmoid(shallowEval) otherwise. Clarifies ROADMAP SC2's 'over expanded children' wording (fixture must mix expanded + unexpanded children)

Selection policy.question: Sequential vs parallel-ready core loop
Selection policy.answer: Parallel-ready now: budget.concurrency in-flight expansions, pending/virtual-visit marking so selection skips in-flight nodes; determinism suite at concurrency=1 plus one concurrency=2 fake-provider test

Root candidate union interface.question: How SF MultiPV root candidates enter the pure core
Root candidate union interface.answer: Optional extraRootMoves: string[] on the SearchRunner signature; root children = MaiaTopK union extraRootMoves, graded in the same grade() call; deeper nodes stay Maia-only; EngineProviders stays {policy, grade}

Root candidate union interface.question: Root exploration prior for SF-injected ~0-Maia-probability candidates
Root candidate union interface.answer: Floor-boosted: P_root(c) = max(P_maia(c), ROOT_PRIOR_FLOOR) renormalized, used ONLY in the root exploration term; backup expectations keep true renormalized Maia priors; ranking by V so the floor never distorts scores

Score semantics + RankedLine shape.question: Internal representation of practicalScore
Score semantics + RankedLine shape.answer: Expected score 0..1 from the root side-to-move's perspective (native evalToExpectedScore space; SEED-082's stated unit). Display formatting ('practically +0.9') is a Phase 155 decision from the raw {practicalScore, objectiveEvalCp} pair; the core never converts

Score semantics + RankedLine shape.question: ELO parameterization in SearchBudget
Score semantics + RankedLine shape.answer: Color-keyed: budget.elo = { w, b }; core picks ELO purely from node side-to-move color (ENGINE-04 keying becomes structural); yourElo/opponentElo -> color mapping resolved once in the Phase 155 hook

Score semantics + RankedLine shape.question: Move notation in core interfaces
Score semantics + RankedLine shape.answer: UCI throughout lib/engine (policy keys, grade candidates, RankedLine.rootMove/modalPath, canonical tie-break key = UCI string); SAN conversion only at display time in Phase 155

Budget + snapshot contract.question: What counts as one node toward maxNodes
Budget + snapshot contract.answer: One expansion event: one policy() call + one batched grade() call over the node's truncated top-k = 1 node; budgetExhausted at nodesEvaluated >= maxNodes. Maps 1:1 to wall-clock cost drivers and SEED-082's node arithmetic

Budget + snapshot contract.question: Where anytime-snapshot throttling lives
Budget + snapshot contract.answer: Core emits onSnapshot after EVERY completed backup (no wall-clock in lib/engine); the Phase 155 hook throttles to UI cadence. ENGINE-07 test asserts the full emission sequence is bit-identical across runs

Budget + snapshot contract.question: Engine ~90% mass truncation vs chart's CUMULATIVE_MASS_THRESHOLD=0.95
Budget + snapshot contract.answer: Separate new named constant in lib/engine (e.g. POLICY_MASS_THRESHOLD = 0.90), independent of moveQuality.ts's 0.95 — search branching and chart display tune independently
